title: Bridge Essay: Imitation, empathy, and mirror neurons.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Social Incarnation — intersubjectivity, embodied empathy, social predictive processing, second-person neuroscience.

**Imitation, empathy, and mirror neurons.** — Annu Rev Psychol. PMID: 18793090. DOI: 10.1146/annurev.psych.60.110707.163604. There is aconvergence between cognitive models of imitation, constructs derived from social psychology studies on mimicry and empathy, and recent empirical findings from the neurosciences. The ideomotor framework of human actions assumes acommon representational format for action and perception that facilitates imitation.
